analysis.dense_contribution: 4/20 alone, but essential for hybrid fusion
analysis.bm25_contribution: 7/20 alone, keyword matching stronger than dense for exact passages
analysis.reranker_contribution: +6 to dense alone, +2 to BM25, +0 to hybrid (ceiling effect)
analysis.fusion_value: hybrid without reranker matches full pipeline (10/20)
analysis.bottleneck: 10/20 queries consistently miss across all configs - likely GT passages that span chunk boundaries or have OCR variations

previous_baseline.note: Previous was AO-only collection (486 chunks). Now 5552 chunks across 16 books - more candidates means more noise for exact passage retrieval.
